mapper.select: SELECT main_cd, sub_cd, code_nm::text AS code_nm, code_info::text AS code_info, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM om_code_m WHERE main_cd = 'CODE' ORDER BY COALESCE((code_info->>'disp_seq')::int, 2147483647), sub_cd

SELECT main_cd, sub_cd, code_nm::text AS code_nm, code_info::text AS code_info, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM om_code_m WHERE main_cd = #{mainCd} ORDER BY COALESCE((code_info->>'disp_seq')::int, 2147483647), sub_cd
SELECT main_cd, sub_cd, code_nm::text AS code_nm, code_info::text AS code_info, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM om_code_m WHERE main_cd = #{mainCd} AND sub_cd = #{subCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_code_m (main_cd, sub_cd, code_nm, code_info, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{mainCd}, #{subCd}, CAST(#{codeNmJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{codeInfoJson} AS jsonb), #{actorUserId}, #{actorUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE om_code_m SET code_info = jsonb_set( COALESCE(code_info, '{}'::jsonb), '{disp_seq}', to_jsonb(#{dispSeq}::int), true), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{actorUserId} WHERE main_cd = #{mainCd} AND sub_cd = #{subCd}
